title: Link-Bearing Elements, Relations, Base URLs, and Crawl Graph · Systems Transfer
summary: An independent community information owner supplies a different origin, HTML structure, rate contract, accessibility need, resource ceiling, and injected failure and transfers link-bearing elements, relations, base urls, and crawl graph into a changed semantic provenance-rich link graph. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of semantic provenance-rich link graph with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case…
objectives: Distinguish navigation, resource, metadata, embedded, form, media, and alternate URL-bearing HTML elements.
Use first valid base semantics against final response URL and retain accepted and rejected base evidence.
Interpret rel tokens, canonical, alternate, hreflang, download, media, nofollow, and target under explicit owner policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Link Elements
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go team handles case 4694 during a keyboard-first accessible report review. Build deterministic Go evidence to classify link elements, base and relation semantics, rejected references, and provenance-rich graph edges; owner permission, robots preference, and legal-review conclusions stay distinct; then reorder one origin, retry, channel, context, goroutine, Colly callback, checkpoint, or shutdown event and prove ownership. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Distinguish navigation, resource, metadata, embedded, form, media, and alternate URL-bearing HTML elements.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Link Elements.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for distinguish navigation, resource, metadata, embedded, form, media, and alternate url-bearing html elements. For Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Link Elements, keep Link Elements connected to executable Go authorization, URL, robots, response, tree, frontier, goroutine, report, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Edge Evidence
steps.instruction:
